Import bank statements
PDF parsing requires server-side processing.
To import new statements, send your ZIP file to Claude
and ask to "remove all transactions and add these".
📁
Upload your ZIP to Claude
Password: 302921400
Steps:
1. Attach your ZIP file to a Claude message
2. Type: "remove all transactions and add these"
3. Claude will parse, import and update this file

👥 User Management
Admin — full access  ·  Trustee — view all + change ticket status  ·  Viewer — read-only, selected tabs only  ·  Resident — tickets tab only

📤 Export settings
Download a JSON file with all your settings
📥 Import settings
Load a previously exported settings.json file
☁ Sync to Netlify
Step 1 — Click Export below to download a settings.json with all your invoices, attachments, flags and names included
Step 2 — Open your Netlify site → click ⚙ Settings → Import → choose the file
🌐 Public reporting
A public link residents can use to submit a report, enquiry, or maintenance issue without logging in. Share this URL in the WhatsApp group, on a noticeboard, or anywhere convenient. When disabled, the link shows a "currently disabled" message.
Public link to share
🔐 Permissions
Control what each role can do by default, and override specific permissions for individual users. Changes apply immediately.
🔐 Devices
Devices that can sign in to your account using Face ID, fingerprint, or Windows Hello. Remove a device if you no longer want it to sign in.
Loading…
🧹 Maintenance
Delete orphaned documents that aren't attached to any ticket (left behind when tickets are deleted). Choose which document type to purge.
Scanning…
Role default permissions
These apply to all users of each role unless overridden per-user.
Per-user overrides
Pick a user, then toggle any permission to override the role default.
